text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Ahhhh! Outta the way! Move!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Eeeek!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mayano Top Gun comes running straight at me, but I somehow
manage to safely stop her.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Sorry about that. And thanks for catching me.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Ehehe, I guess this isn't the first time this has happened.

text_block_list.name: Math Teacher
text_block_list.text:
You get back here right this instant, Mayano! For the last time, I'm
telling you to turn in your homework today!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Whoops. Now isn't the time to talk!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Anyway, I gotta scramble outta here! Catch you later!

text_block_list.name: Math Teacher
text_block_list.text:
Oh, she can be such a handful! She's too quick for her own good. I'm
sorry, but could you give her a talking-to as well?

text_block_list.name: Math Teacher
text_block_list.text:
She needs to submit her homework, unless she wants detention eating
into her training time!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hurriedly search for my troublemaking trainee, only to find her
hiding under my desk in the trainers' office.
choice_data_list: So this is where you went, Mayano.
So this is where you went, Mayano.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Ahhh—oh wait, it's just you. I don't mind being found by you! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Where'd my teacher go? She isn't here, right? Phew... I thought I was done for!
choice_data_list: Have you not been doing your homework?
Have you not been doing your homework?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
It's no fair! She gives me extra homework just 'cause I fall asleep
during class!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I only slept while we were reviewing yesterday's stuff! Besides, I can
just figure it all out if I read the textbook!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
She also tells me to "show my work" or whatever on our tests, but who
cares as long as the answer's right?!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Why does she keep picking on me?!
choice_data_list:
If you don't do your homework, you'll be doing
math detention instead of training.

If you don't do your homework, you'll be doing
math detention instead of training.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh! I totally forgot about that! Detention makes me lose out on
training!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Urk. I didn't care much about training before, but now... Argh!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Why does this have to happen after I decide to start training with you?! All I wanted was to become a twinkly grown-up...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Hrmmm... But I don't wanna do homework... Blegh...
choice_data_list: Who knows? You may discover something new.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Something new?
choice_data_list:
Like what happened with training. There was a
point to that, remember?

Like what happened with training. There was a
point to that, remember?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: That's different... I think... Okay, maybe not, but...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: A new discovery, huh? Hrm...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: All I can think of is how boring it'd be! But like...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: If you're saying that it'd help, I guess it wouldn't hurt to try...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
But! If I do this, I'm going to need something in return. Like another
date! ♪ And it has to be something grown-ups do!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Got it?! You got it, right?! Yaaay! Where should we go this time?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mayano Top Gun hums happily to herself as she finishes her
homework.
